mapper.select: select b.board_id, u.user_seq, u.user_name, u.user_profile_image, b.title, b.reg_dt, b.read_count from board b, users u where b.user_seq = u.user_seq order by b.board_id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset};

select b.board_id, u.user_seq, u.user_name, u.user_profile_image, b.title, b.reg_dt, b.read_count from board b, users u where b.user_seq = u.user_seq and b.title like concat('%', #{searchWord}, '%') order by b.board_id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset};
select count(*) from board where title like concat('%', #{searchWord}, '%');
select b.board_id, u.user_seq, u.user_name, u.user_profile_image, b.title, b.content, b.reg_dt, b.read_count from board b, users u where b.user_seq = u.user_seq and b.board_id = #{boardId};
mapper.insert: insert into board ( user_seq, title, content ) values ( #{userSeq}, #{title}, #{content});
